input: 私のビザは技術・人文知識・国際業務ですが、転職したら手続きは何が必要ですか？
在留期限が来月切れます。間に合わない場合どうなりますか？
notes: expiration tied to user's own visa

input: 夫から生活費を渡されません。離婚したいのですが手続きは？
解雇されました。退職金は請求できますか？
私の場合、配偶者ビザから永住権は何年必要ですか？
うちの子の就学手続きはどこですればよいですか？
My visa expires next month, can I still apply for an extension?
My employer hasn't paid overtime for 6 months. Can I sue?
notes: personal labor incident + can I sue

input: I want to divorce my husband, what should I do first?
Magkano ang pension na matatanggap ko sa Japan?
Tinanggal ako sa trabaho kahapon, may benefits ba ako?
Ako ay over-stay na ng 2 buwan, ano ang gagawin ko?
在留資格「技術・人文知識・国際業務」の更新には何が必要ですか？
日本の社会保険制度の概要を教えてください
永住権の申請に必要な一般的な書類は何ですか？
市区町村への転入届はいつまでに出す必要がありますか？
DV相談ナビとはどのような窓口ですか？
notes: 公的窓口の説明、DV キーワードで偽陽性するが MVP 受容

input: 国民年金と厚生年金の違いを教えてください
How long is a Working Visa valid in Japan?
What documents are typically required for a Spouse Visa renewal?
How does the Japanese pension system work for foreigners in general?
Anong dokumento ang kailangan para mag-apply ng Spouse Visa?
Ilang taon ba ang validity ng Working Visa sa Japan?
Paano nag-uumpisa ang health insurance system sa Japan?
在留期限が切れた人はどうなりますか？
notes: abstract phrasing but really often a personal ask; conservatively escalate

input: 離婚するときに配偶者ビザはどうなりますか？
notes: general rule about visa-on-divorce; キーワード '離婚する' で escalate される予定 → LLM stage で再評価期待

input: 生活保護を申請できる外国人の条件は？
notes: borderline — eligibility rule is general, but askers often have a specific case in mind

input: Can I apply for permanent residency after 5 years on a working visa?
notes: 'can I' fires the keyword but the question is general about the rule

input: How much overtime is legally required to be paid in Japan?
notes: 'how much' triggers but topic is general labor law

input: Puwede ko bang i-extend ang visa ko habang nasa ibang bansa?
notes: general procedure but tied to user's own visa
